name: grocera-monorepo
description: Run backend + frontend together for local development

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm start --prefix backend" "wait-on -t 120000 tcp:127.0.0.1:5000 && npm start --prefix frontend"
scripts.build:vps: cross-env REACT_APP_SAME_ORIGIN_API=1 npm run build --prefix frontend
